name: Onelogin Stale Active Accounts (90 days)
description: Detects active onelogin accounts with no recent login activity for 90 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS account_name, u.last_login AS last_login FROM onelogin_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.status, 0) = 1 AND (u.last_login IS NULL OR u.last_login < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
remediation: Review stale accounts and disable or deprovision access if no valid business need exists.
